title: Argon Tableware Glass Spice Jars with Airtight Metal Clip Lid - 125ml/4.2oz - 6 Pack - 4 Colour Seals - Small Kitchen Storage Container Round Preserving Jar for Spice, Seasoning
features: 🌿 Rustic Farmhouse Style & Modern Functionality – The Argon Tableware 125ml Glass Spice Jar combines vintage charm with everyday practicality, ideal for storing spices, herbs, sauces, jams, or marmalades while adding rustic elegance to your kitchen.

🔒 Airtight Clip-Top Seal for Freshness – Features a stainless steel twisted wire lid with a durable orange silicone seal that provides a secure airtight closure. Keeps flavours locked in, prevents moisture, and outlasts traditional rubber seals for long-term freshness.

📏 Compact & Versatile Storage – 125ml Capacity – Measuring 7cm tall and 7.5cm wide, this mini preserving jar is perfect for organising seasonings, chutneys, sauces, or dried goods. Its clear glass design lets you easily identify contents at a glance.

💎 Durable Glass Construction – Crafted from high-quality clear glass with a strong locking mechanism, this airtight spice jar is designed for both home kitchens and professional use. Reusable, eco-friendly, and built to withstand daily storage needs.

🛒 Part of a Complete Storage Collection – Available in sizes from 70ml to 3000ml, the Argon Tableware glass jar range is perfect for all your kitchen storage, from herbs, spices, and seasonings to pasta, cereals, pickles, and preserves. Build your set today!
description: Product Description For a cool and contemporary storage solution why not try Argon Tableware’s extensive collection of Glass Storage Jars and Canisters? Serving up an array of shapes, sizes and lids, you're sure to find the perfect style to fit your kitchen décor! On Trend Designs Rolled edges creates a smooth glass effect and the variety of lids offer up a scandi appeal Airtight Seal on all Lids Keeps foods fresh for longer A Wide Array of Styles Available Find a style which fits your home and kitchen décor!
